General.Name: SOCAM Development Ltd
General.Description: SOCAM Development Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the construction and property businesses in Mainland China, Hong Kong, and Macau. The company operates through three segments: Construction and Maintenance, Property, and Other Businesses. The Construction and Maintenance segment provides construction, interior fit-out, renovation, and maintenance work services; and building information modelling and smart facilities management services. The Property segment offers property development, sale, investment, and management services. The Other Businesses segment is involved in the venture capital investment and other activities. The company also offers maintenance contractor and building construction services; owns and leases plant and machinery; and provides interior decoration, fitting out, design, and structural steel construction services, as well as engages in the facade supply and construction contract activities. In addition, it is involved in provision of consultancy and management services, and security systems; and leasing of investment properties, as well as installs electronic displays. The company was formerly known as Shui On Construction and Materials Limited and changed its name to SOCAM Development Limited in September 2011. The company was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. SOCAM Development Limited is a subsidiary of Shui On Land Limited.
General.Address: Shui On Centre, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
